opinion.h4: UNITED STATES v. FISHER. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE DISTRICT OF NEW JERSEY. No. 700. Decided May 16, 1966.
opinion.p: Solicitor General Marshall, Assistant Attorney General Vinson, Beatrice Rosenberg and Ronald L. Gainer for the United States.
The motion to affirm is granted and the judgment is affirmed.
MR. JUSTICE HARLAN would set the case for argument, postponing consideration of jurisdiction to the hearing of the case on the merits.
